analysis.headline: The current top priority is addressing the venue's high prepayment and cancellation risks. Seating assignments are critical to manage due to several families unassigned and overcapacity issues.
on_track: Photographer is booked with no financial risks.
Stationery printing is complete and within budget.

action_items.do: Negotiate with the venue to secure a more balanced payment schedule and softer cancellation terms to mitigate financial risk.
action_items.why: Current terms require full prepayment before the wedding and have harsh cancellation penalties, posing significant financial risk.
action_items.title: Venue Cancellation Terms and Prepayment Risk

action_items.do: Reassign guests to ensure no table exceeds its capacity and all confirmed guests have seating assignments.
action_items.why: Table '10' is over capacity and several families, including Levi and Goldstein, have no tables, risking logistical issues on the day.
action_items.title: Seating Conflicts

action_items.do: Request clear terms on venue liability and compensation if the venue cancels.
action_items.why: The contract lacks a clause for venue liability if it cancels or cannot host, leaving the couple unprotected.
action_items.title: No Venue Cancellation Clause

action_items.do: Urgently follow up with these households via phone to confirm attendance.
action_items.why: The Ovadia and Azoulay families have not responded post-RSVP deadline. These parties can significantly impact headcount.
action_items.title: Overdue RSVP Responses

action_items.do: Secure a contract with DJ Nova to confirm details and avoid last-minute surprises.
action_items.why: The DJ is still not contracted, leaving pricing and availability in question.
action_items.title: DJ Contract Missing
